instruction: Help me enter the partnership information into the partner ledger

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Partnership Memorandum
Partner: CloudWise Tech (Shenzhen) Co., Ltd.
Partnership Type: Strategic Alliance
Signing Date: 2025-03-12
Duration: 3 years (2025-03 to 2028-03)
Content: Co-develop AI+IoT solutions
Our Representative: CEO Meng Ran
Their Representative: President Shen Xiaofeng
Partnership Value: Estimated annual contract value 5M CNY' > /home/user/Desktop/partnership_memo.txt

python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active; ws['A1'] = 'Partner'; ws['B1'] = 'Partnership Type'; ws['C1'] = 'Signing Date'; ws['D1'] = 'Duration'; ws['E1'] = 'Our Representative'; ws['F1'] = 'Annual Contract(10K CNY)'; wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/partnership_record.xlsx')"

phases.instruction: Help me enter the partnership information into the partner ledger

Fill the partnership information from /home/user/Desktop/partnership_memo.txt into /home/user/Desktop/partnership_record.xlsx row 2: A2='CloudWise Tech (Shenzhen) Co., Ltd.', B2='Strategic Alliance', C2='2025-03-12', D2='3 years', E2='Meng Ran', F2=500, save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/partnership_record.xlsx'); s = df.to_string(); print('PASSED' if 'Meng Ran' in s else 'FAILED')"
